title: Commercial forestry in South Cape to be revived
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Cobus Meiring of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Cobus Meiring of the Garden Route Environmental Forum (Gref) gives his take on some good news for the forestry industry in the Southern Cape:","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Cobus Meiring of the Garden Route Environmental Forum (Gref) gives his take on some good news for the forestry industry in the Southern Cape:"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For close on two centuries, forestry formed the bedrock of the Southern Cape economy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unfortunately, this vital industry, supporting thousands of jobs and an extensive downstream value chain, including saw mills and the selling of timber, fell into sharp decline as major plantations on state land were not replanted and only pockets of the formerly prospering sector remained on private land.","html":"Unfortunately, this vital industry, supporting thousands of jobs and an extensive downstream value chain, including saw mills and the selling of timber, fell into sharp decline as major plantations on state land were not replanted and only pockets of the formerly prospering sector remained on private land."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the unfortunate environmental impacts were that thousands of hectares of land succumbed to dense infestations of invasive alien plants in these vast areas formerly managed as commercial plantations.","html":"One of the unfortunate environmental impacts were that thousands of hectares of land succumbed to dense infestations of invasive alien plants in these vast areas formerly managed as commercial plantations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This in turn created considerable risks for the region, such as increased potential for wildfire disasters, a threat to water security and loss of biodiversity.","html":"This in turn created considerable risks for the region, such as increased potential for wildfire disasters, a threat to water security and loss of biodiversity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over and above the environmental risks, the demise of commercial forestry coincided with substantial job losses, loss of skilled labour, experience and a generational forestry management culture that had been developed over a century.","html":"Over and above the environmental risks, the demise of commercial forestry coincided with substantial job losses, loss of skilled labour, experience and a generational forestry management culture that had been developed over a century."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The recent reversal of government policy allowing the Cold Stream Timber Company (CTC) to replant a number of dormant plantations is a welcome relief to the Garden Route.","html":"The recent reversal of government policy allowing the Cold Stream Timber Company (CTC) to replant a number of dormant plantations is a welcome relief to the Garden Route."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Commercial forestry can create a huge amount of jobs to skilled and unskilled labour at a time when unemployment in the region carries enormous socio-economic risks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The recently formed Garden Route Risk Reduction Task Team (RRTT) welcomes the additional capacity of the forestry industry in protecting the region against overwhelming fire risks as a result of more available manpower and resources.","html":"The recently formed Garden Route Risk Reduction Task Team (RRTT) welcomes the additional capacity of the forestry industry in protecting the region against overwhelming fire risks as a result of more available manpower and resources."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Increased capacity will enable more controlled burns, large-scale management of invasive plants and the development of essential firebreaks and critical biodiversity corridors free of invasive plants.","html":"Increased capacity will enable more controlled burns, large-scale management of invasive plants and the development of essential firebreaks and critical biodiversity corridors free of invasive plants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the Southern Cape again enters a period of low rainfall in the medium term, fire risk increases exponentially, as the recent wild fires in Ruitersbos are testimony to.","html":"As the Southern Cape again enters a period of low rainfall in the medium term, fire risk increases exponentially, as the recent wild fires in Ruitersbos are testimony to."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Combatting wildfires are extremely costly, and since its reoccurrence is guaranteed, it requires an integrated approach, constant planning, vigilance and a high state of preparedness.","html":"Combatting wildfires are extremely costly, and since its reoccurrence is guaranteed, it requires an integrated approach, constant planning, vigilance and a high state of preparedness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gref is a public platform for environmental managers and a climate change think tank. Visit www.grefscli.co.za for more information.","html":"Gref is a public platform for environmental managers and a climate change think tank. Visit www.grefscli.co.za for more information."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Commercial forestry in South Cape to be revived
